ocr_findings.description: Section heading rendered as '4.0 基数' in OCR; image shows '基数' with a ruby annotation (きすう) above it. The '4.0' prefix is a spurious artifact, likely from a decorative bullet/icon misread. Cosmetic.
Subscript notation in body text: '(10)₂' and '(10)₁₀' are rendered as '(10)₂' and '(10)₁₀' in OCR — subscripts appear preserved. Minor formatting variance only.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 基数 (radix) and 基数変換 with a 17-row conversion table (2進/10進/16進数). The table is fully captured with correct values including hex A-F entries. The 数字の読み方 and 捨てるのもアリ sidebar boxes are captured. Main error is a spurious '4.0' prefix on the 基数 heading.
